author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 34: 2 Tier-3 net/sched docs (action framework + default qdisc). net/sched/act-api.md (action API: tcf_register_action / tc_action_ops registry, struct tc_action layout, tcfa_refcnt + tcfa_bindcnt sharing, tcf_action_exec walk w/ TC_ACT_PIPE chaining + TC_ACT_GOTO_CHAIN, RTM_*TACT wire w/ full TCA_ACT_* NLA set, per-netns IDR for shared-action lookup, multi-part dump, HW offload via offload_act_setup, per-CPU bstats/qstats — 12 REQ / 10 AC, 0 open) + net/sched/sch-fq-codel.md (kernel-default qdisc since 4.12: per-flow hash-perturb classification, CoDel state machine RFC 8289 w/ count/dropping/next_drop + interval/sqrt(count) backoff, ECN marking + CE_THRESHOLD, deficit round-robin between new_flows/old_flows, memory_limit+drop_batch_size, perturb-rotation defense vs hash-collision DoS; OWNS mandatory models/net/sch_fq_codel.tla — 12 REQ / 10 AC, 0 open). 9 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: 107 .design docs. Next: net/sched/sch-htb.md (HTB; owns models/net/sch_htb.tla rate-bound proof) + net/sched/sch-cake.md (CAKE; extends fq_codel w/ shaping + per-host fairness — common laptop/router default).
